data_separation.sealed_terminal_oos: 2025 and later according to the existing sealed manifest
data_separation.rule: No 2023 strategy outcome is opened until one candidate_key, execution contract, costs and gates are frozen from 2022 only. No 2024 outcome is opened after a 2023 failure for the same family.

official_data.source: Binance USD-M public monthly aggTrades archives with adjacent SHA-256 CHECKSUM
official_data.decision_rule: Only aggregate trades whose exchange timestamp is strictly before the selected flow-window end may enter the signal.

economic_families.mechanism: A large first boundary imbalance with same-direction price efficiency and elevated dollar participation represents institutional schedule flow that continues over the following activity horizon.
Large aggressive imbalance with weak or opposite price response indicates passive absorption and is faded only after the flow window is complete.
economic_families.trade_direction: opposite sign of causal boundary imbalance

economic_families.mechanism: The first 10-second imbalance is rejected when the incremental 10-to-60-second flow reverses and price accepts the reversal.
An extreme BTC boundary flow shock can propagate to ETH, SOL or XRP after the BTC flow is observable; target-asset entry never precedes the BTC decision clock.
economic_families.trade_direction: registered follow or absorption interpretation selected on 2022 only

forbidden_search: post-entry MFE or MAE as an entry input

rolling_state.quantile_estimation: expanding or trailing 60 calendar days using completed prior boundaries only

execution_contract.base_entry: first official one-minute open at or after the flow-window completion, never a price before the decision clock
execution_contract.same_timestamp_conflict: highest absolute prior-standardized flow score; exact ties BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP
execution_contract.catastrophe_stop: based only on ATR available before entry
execution_contract.funding: actual historical settlement rate and position sign
execution_contract.alpha_selection_notional: 1x equity; no risk or leverage optimization

cost_grid_round_trip_bp.note: Includes taker commissions plus spread, latency slippage and small-order impact. Account-specific live commission is re-read before deployment.

development_promotion_gate.selection_score: minimum fold log growth, then 32bp total log growth, then lower concentration; not target daily return
